_meta.citation: ROADMAP SC-2 verbatim: --reductions 0.05,0.10,0.20 over a baseline AffordabilityRequest. Engine emits breaches_threshold=true at the -20% reduction (dti_back=0.451477 > 0.43 threshold) and false at -5%/-10% (dti_back=0.380191/0.401313 below the threshold). 20% reduction also hits Phase 4 D-11 DTI-CAP-CONVENTIONAL blocker.

notes: Income $7000/mo + $400k loan @ 6.5% / 30yr produces baseline dti_back=0.361181 (Phase 4 D-06 sum aggregation; single applicant). At -20% reduction the 0.43 cap is breached, matching SC-2 verbatim narrative ('flags which rows breach a configured affordability threshold'). Per Plan 08-05 deviation Rule 2 hand-tuning: $10k income would put baseline at 0.252 with NO reduction breaching at 0.43, so $7k chosen to land near the threshold. Engine-emitted values per D-05-01.
